metadata.description: Kanban board for Stripe Payment Method Integration and Setup. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.epicTitle: Stripe Payment Method Integration and Setup
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task and 6 broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units).

tasks.title: Stripe Payment Method Integration and Setup
tasks.description: Integrate Stripe payment processing to collect and manage payment methods (credit card, ACH) for subscription billing. Includes secure payment method storage.
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want to securely add and manage my payment method so that my subscription can be billed automatically.
acceptanceCriteria: Given a store owner is setting up payment, when they enter valid credit card information, then the payment method is securely stored via Stripe and associated with their account
Given a store owner adds a payment method, when the card is declined or invalid, then they receive a clear error message with guidance on how to fix it
Given a store owner has a payment method on file, when they view their billing settings, then they can see the last 4 digits and expiration date of their card
Given a store owner wants to update payment, when they add a new payment method, then the new method becomes the default and the old method is archived
Given a payment method is stored, when subscription billing occurs, then Stripe automatically charges the default payment method
Given a store owner is in their 30-day trial, when they add a payment method, then it is stored but not charged until trial ends
tasks.businessValue: Enables subscription billing and revenue collection. Critical for business model.
tasks.technicalNotes: Use Stripe Elements for secure card input. Store Stripe customer ID and payment method IDs. Never store full card numbers. Implement webhook handlers for payment events.
successMetrics: Payment setup success rate: 95%+ of accounts successfully set up payment
Payment method update success rate: 90%+ of update attempts succeed
businessRules: Payment methods are stored securely via Stripe (PCI compliance)
Only one default payment method per account
Payment methods can be updated at any time
Payment method is required before trial ends for subscription continuation
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks below break this down into 1-2 day units.

tasks.title: Stripe Account Setup and Configuration
tasks.description: Set up Stripe account, obtain API keys, configure webhook endpoints, and store credentials securely.
tasks.userStory: As a developer, I want to configure Stripe so that payment processing infrastructure is ready.
acceptanceCriteria: Given Stripe account, when created, then API keys (publishable and secret) are obtained
Given Stripe configuration, when set up, then webhook endpoints are configured for payment events
Given API keys, when stored, then they are stored securely in Azure Key Vault or environment variables
Given webhook configuration, when complete, then webhook signing secret is stored securely
Given Stripe setup, when configured, then test mode and production mode are properly separated
tasks.businessValue: Foundation for payment processing. Required for subscription billing.
tasks.technicalNotes: Create Stripe account. Obtain API keys. Configure webhook endpoints. Store secrets in Azure Key Vault. Document configuration.
businessRules: API keys must be stored securely (never in code)
Separate test and production keys
Webhook signing secret must be validated

tasks.title: Stripe Elements Integration in Frontend
tasks.description: Integrate Stripe Elements in React frontend to securely collect payment method information without handling card data directly.
tasks.userStory: As a developer, I want to use Stripe Elements so that payment information is collected securely without PCI compliance burden.
acceptanceCriteria: Given payment form, when rendered, then Stripe Elements card input is displayed
Given card input, when user enters card details, then data is sent directly to Stripe (not through our server)
Given card validation, when card is invalid, then validation errors are displayed in real-time
Given payment form, when submitted, then payment method is created via Stripe API
Given payment method creation, when successful, then payment method ID is returned and stored
Given payment form, when displayed, then it follows Material UI design and is responsive
tasks.businessValue: Enables secure payment method collection without PCI compliance requirements.
tasks.technicalNotes: Use @stripe/stripe-js and @stripe/react-stripe-js. Implement Stripe Elements (CardElement). Handle validation. Create payment method via Stripe API.
successMetrics: No card data touches our servers
businessRules: Card data must never be sent to our backend
Payment method creation happens client-side
Stripe Elements handles PCI compliance

tasks.title: Backend API for Payment Method Storage
tasks.description: Create backend API endpoints to store payment method IDs, associate with company accounts, and manage payment methods.
tasks.userStory: As a developer, I want backend APIs so that payment methods can be stored and associated with company accounts.
acceptanceCriteria: Given payment method ID, when received from frontend, then it is validated with Stripe API
Given valid payment method, when stored, then Stripe customer ID and payment method ID are saved to database
Given payment method storage, when processed, then payment method is associated with company account
Given payment method API, when accessed, then it requires authentication and company context
Given payment method retrieval, when requested, then stored payment methods are returned with last 4 digits and expiration
Given payment method storage, when successful, then default payment method is set if it's the first one
tasks.businessValue: Enables secure storage and management of payment methods on the backend.
tasks.technicalNotes: Create StorePaymentMethod HTTP function. Validate payment method with Stripe. Store Stripe customer ID and payment method ID. Never store full card numbers. Use transactions.
successMetrics: 100% of stored payment methods are valid
businessRules: Never store full card numbers
Only store Stripe payment method IDs
One default payment method per account
Payment methods must be validated with Stripe

tasks.title: Payment Method Management UI
tasks.description: Create React UI for viewing, adding, and managing payment methods in billing settings.
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want a UI to manage my payment methods so that I can view and update my billing information.
acceptanceCriteria: Given billing settings page, when accessed, then stored payment methods are displayed with last 4 digits and expiration
Given payment method display, when viewed, then default payment method is clearly indicated
Given add payment method, when clicked, then Stripe Elements form is displayed
Given payment method form, when submitted, then new payment method is added and displayed
Given payment method list, when displayed, then all payment methods are shown with option to set as default
Given payment method UI, when loaded, then it shows loading state and handles errors gracefully
tasks.businessValue: Provides user interface for payment method management, enabling self-service billing management.
tasks.technicalNotes: Create PaymentMethodManagement component. Use Material UI for layout. Integrate Stripe Elements. Call backend API for storage. Handle loading and error states.
successMetrics: Add payment method flow works end-to-end
businessRules: Default payment method must be clearly indicated
Users can add multiple payment methods
Only one default at a time

tasks.title: Payment Method Update and Deletion
tasks.description: Implement functionality to update default payment method and delete payment methods.
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want to update or remove payment methods so that I can manage my billing information.
acceptanceCriteria: Given payment method list, when user sets new default, then default is updated and old default is unset
Given payment method deletion, when user deletes a payment method, then confirmation dialog is shown
Given deletion confirmation, when confirmed, then payment method is removed from Stripe and database
Given deletion, when last payment method is deleted, then user is warned and cannot delete if it's the only one
Given default update, when processed, then new default is immediately reflected in UI
Given payment method operations, when performed, then success/error messages are displayed
tasks.businessValue: Enables payment method management, allowing users to update billing information.
tasks.technicalNotes: Create UpdateDefaultPaymentMethod and DeletePaymentMethod API endpoints. Update Stripe customer. Update database. Handle edge cases (last payment method).
successMetrics: Default update succeeds 100% of the time
businessRules: Cannot delete last payment method
Default update must be atomic
Deletion requires confirmation

tasks.title: Payment Method Validation and Error Handling
tasks.description: Implement comprehensive validation and error handling for payment method operations including card validation, decline handling, and user-friendly error messages.
tasks.userStory: As a developer, I want robust validation and error handling so that payment method operations provide clear feedback to users.
acceptanceCriteria: Given card validation, when card is declined, then user receives clear error message with guidance
Given card validation, when card is expired, then specific error message is shown
Given card validation, when card number is invalid, then validation error is displayed immediately
Given API errors, when Stripe API fails, then user-friendly error message is shown
Given network errors, when connection fails, then retry option is provided
Given error handling, when implemented, then all error scenarios are handled gracefully
tasks.businessValue: Improves user experience with clear error messages and validation feedback.
tasks.technicalNotes: Handle Stripe error codes. Map technical errors to user-friendly messages. Implement retry logic. Validate card details before submission.
successMetrics: Validation errors are clear and actionable
businessRules: Error messages must be user-friendly (no technical jargon)
Card validation happens in real-time
Network errors allow retry
